content.text: Check the logs for the doorbell-detection Service at pi@mic. whats the Intervall of the template trimed to?

input.description: Check recent logs for doorbell-detection service on pi@mic

input.command: ssh pi@mic 'systemctl list-units --all --type=service | grep -i doorbell; echo "---"; systemctl list-unit-files | grep -i doorbell'
input.description: Find the exact doorbell service unit name on pi@mic

result.output:
doorbell-detector-boot.service                              loaded    inactive dead    Start doorbell-detector on boot if within operating hours (07:00–21:00)
  doorbell-detector-start.service                             loaded    inactive dead    Start doorbell-detector (timer-triggered)
  doorbell-detector-stop.service                              loaded    inactive dead    Stop doorbell-detector (timer-triggered)
  doorbell-detector.service                                   loaded    active   running Doorbell Detector – pattern-matching audio detector
---
doorbell-detector-boot.service             enabled         enabled
doorbell-detector-start.service            static          -
doorbell-detector-stop.service             static          -
doorbell-detector.service                  enabled         enabled
doorbell-detector-start.timer              enabled         enabled
doorbell-detector-stop.timer               enabled         enabled
